FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "MgmtServices"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "limit_icmp_out"
        set uuid 27df94a0-290c-51f1-8b64-306cac45e78a
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuGroup"
        set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "svc-ICMP"
        set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
next
end
